name: money-os
description: Your AI financial consciousness — a 24/7 wealth-building co-pilot that remembers you between sessions. 17 skills across 5 layers with persistent financial profile, unified /money-os entry point, and shareable artifacts. Cash flow intelligence, Freedom Number with Monte Carlo simulation, wealth leak scanning ($2K-8K/year), portfolio health checks, tax-aware rebalancing, tax-loss harvesting, macro radar, tax strategy, tax return analysis, thesis-to-trade conversion, decision modeling, life event playbooks, generational wealth planning, adaptive education, and a courage engine. Your data never leaves your computer.
